introSection: Teddy Bear was a Wooden roller coaster at Coney Island designed by Herbert Schmeck. Teddy Bear at Stricker's Grove is an identical copy of this ride using the same blueprints.
fullText: Teddy Bear was a Wooden roller coaster at Coney Island designed by Herbert Schmeck. Teddy Bear at Stricker's Grove is an identical copy of this ride using the same blueprints.
